title: Validation report for cdif.bbr.metadata.profiles.cdifProfile.cdifCore - CDIF Core metadata

entries.message: Test was expected to fail and it did.

ValidationError: 'schema:name' is a required property

                  '@type',
                  '@context',
                  'schema:name',
                  'schema:identifier',
                  'schema:dateModified',
                  'schema:subjectOf']}

On instance:

                  'schema': 'http://schema.org/',
                  'xsd': 'http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#'},
